user_parameters_schema.description: Configure your Matrix endpoint for this enrollment

webhook_base_url_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the base URL of your Matrix server (e.g. https://hooks.slack.com)
webhook_base_url_secret.title: Webhook Base URL Secret Name

webhook_path_secret.description: Name of the customer secret containing the webhook path (e.g. /_matrix/client/v3/rooms/{room}/send/m.room.message/{txn})
webhook_path_secret.title: Webhook Path Secret Name

user_parameters_schema.title: Matrix Transformer Configuration

webhook_base_url_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the base URL (scheme + host) of your Matrix webhook

webhook_path_secret.ui:description: Enter the name of the customer secret that holds the webhook path
